reviewer: Codex visual review from application Drawing Review UI screenshot

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: The generated drawing does not match the same-name reference layout and callout strategy visible in the application screenshot.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The generated front/top/right view group is shifted and visually compressed compared with the reference; the right projected view region does not read like the reference.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: One required real DisplayDim is still missing against the 12-dimension reference floor, and the visible hole/end-offset/small-projection dimension groups are not reproduced.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Generated dimensions are clustered around the front/right view area and remain AutoDimension-like instead of readable distributed manufacturing callouts.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated sheet still contains generic bottom text/title information that does not match the compact reference presentation.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: The generated bottom notes are generic template/manufacturing text and do not match the reference-style compact callout area.

findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot evidence was captured and is readable.
The generated drawing improved structurally but still fails visual acceptance: final DisplayDim evidence is 11/12 against the reference floor.
Dimensions remain concentrated near the generated front/right view area instead of matching the reference drawing's distributed end-offset, hole-location, and small projected-view callouts.
The right-side projected view and small-feature callout region still differ from the same-name reference.
Generic bottom notes/title information remains visible and does not match the reference sheet presentation.
API pass_with_warning fields are supporting evidence only and do not override this visual FAIL judgement.

improvement_evidence.post_layout_recovery_issue: post-layout reference-intent view slot rebinding returned target_view_not_found, so the missing DisplayDim could not be restored after reopen/prune.

entries.required_correction: Keep 006 scoped first. Preserve all 12 explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim targets through SaveAs, Close/Reopen, prune, post-layout repair, and final export; fix post-layout view-slot rebinding and rerun Drawing Review UI screenshot validation before expanding to 007/008/009/015/022.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing with every required visual_checklist item true.
